error.title: Call Error
error.message: An unexpected error occurred during the call.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting:
troubleshooting.permissions: Make sure you granted camera and microphone permissions
troubleshooting.browser: Check that your browser supports video calls (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
troubleshooting.https: Ensure you are using HTTPS connection

permissions.title: Camera & Microphone Access
permissions.description: To join this video call, we need access to your camera and microphone.
permissions.descriptionGranted: You can now join the video call.
permissions.requesting: Please allow access in your browser...
permissions.errorDenied: Camera and microphone access denied. Please check your browser settings and allow access.
permissions.errorNotFound: No camera or microphone found. Please connect a device and try again.
permissions.errorInUse: Camera or microphone is already in use by another application.
permissions.errorUnavailable: Unable to access camera and microphone. Please try again.
permissions.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
permissions.instructionChrome: Click the camera icon in the address bar
permissions.instructionFirefox: Click the camera icon in the address bar
permissions.instructionSafari: Go to Safari Settings → Privacy → Camera/Microphone
